mainEntity.name: Can I file a workers comp claim in West Valley City if injured on day 1 of employment?
mainEntity.text: Can I file a workers comp claim in West Valley City if injured on day 1 of employment?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah workers comp covers injuries even for new or part-time employees from day one, as long as work-related. Report immediately to employer despite short tenure[3][4].

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah's no-fault system entitles all employees, including those injured on their first day in West Valley City, to benefits for medical costs and lost wages. Probationary status doesn't affect coverage, but prompt reporting within 180 days (ideally immediate) prevents disputes. Get physician's report filed[1][3].

name: Day 1 Work Injury Claims West Valley City UT
